name: KindSoul
description: KindSoul is a charity-focused cryptocurrency on Solana that turns every transaction into an act of kindness. 80% of creator rewards fund real-world charitable work globally—feeding homeless communities, supporting elderly care homes, and helping hungry children. Built on transparency, every donation is recorded on blockchain with public receipts. With 29 active volunteers across 4 continents, KindSoul proves that crypto can change lives, not just wallets.
